scripts.typegen:all: pnpm run schema:extract && pnpm run typegen
scripts.dataset:copy:dev-to-prod: SANITY_ACTIVE_ENV=development pnpm exec sanity dataset export development ./dev-export.tar.gz --overwrite && SANITY_ACTIVE_ENV=production pnpm exec sanity dataset import ./dev-export.tar.gz production --replace
scripts.dataset:copy:prod-to-dev: SANITY_ACTIVE_ENV=production pnpm exec sanity dataset export production ./prod-export.tar.gz --overwrite && SANITY_ACTIVE_ENV=development pnpm exec sanity dataset import ./prod-export.tar.gz development --replace
